generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how underfunded our military has been. Last year, our local base had to delay critical maintenance because of budget cuts. Meanwhile, other countries are increasing their defense budgets. We can't afford to fall behind. It's not just about us - our allies rely on our strength. Let's make sure our troops have what they need to keep us all safe. #SupportOurMilitary #NationalSecurityFirst
